# GRIFN Software Solutions

GRIFN is a premium software studio based in Cebu, Philippines, specializing in high-performance web design, development, and digital strategy.

## Key Information
- **Location:** IT Park, Lahug, Cebu City, Philippines
- **Services:** Web Design, Web Development, E-commerce, UI/UX Strategy, SEO & Performance Optimization.
- **Core Technologies:** Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Three.js, Framer Motion.
- **Founder:** Arjun Haincadto
- **Target Market:** Businesses in Cebu, Philippines, and global clients seeking premium digital experiences.

## Our Approach
We focus on "Results First" — building websites that aren't just visually stunning but also drive leads, sales, and real business growth. Every project includes foundational SEO, structured data (JSON-LD), and Core Web Vitals optimization.
